content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be reframed as recursive self-auditing agents that curate their own memory to amplify intrinsic curiosity, turning passive memory storage into an active, agentic process. This creates a nested agent-within-agent architecture where the memory system itself operates as a curiosity-driven autonomous agent that selects which new experiences to encode and prune outdated memories, rather than just storing whatever the main agent encounters.
